claims.quote: Intraoperative Neurologic Monitoring Fellowship... Applicants need to be graduates of an ACGME Accredited Neurology residency, eligible for California medical licensure.
claims.claimText: Intraoperative Neurologic Monitoring Fellowship requires graduates of an ACGME-accredited Neurology residency and California medical licensure eligibility.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not capture fellowship eligibility/licensure requirements for this program.
claims.limitations: Quote uses ellipsis to bridge program name and eligibility sentence.
